name: Christy’s Homemade Apple Pie

ingredients.item: granny smith apples peeled and cut into small pieces.
sugar depending on how sweet you want it

method: Preheat oven to 425° F. Mix ingredients and pour into a uncooked pastry-lined pie plate. Add pats of butter on top and sprinkle with flour or cornstarch. Cover the top with pie crust, trim excess dough and flute edges. Put two fork marks in the center to vent. Put in freezer for 5 minutes while oven preheats to 425°F. Cover with aluminum foil and bake 5 minutes, then turn down oven to 350°F, and bake for 40 minutes. In the last 15 minutes of your baking time remove foil so top can brown. Serving suggestion: You can eat it warm or cold. Serves 4. Serving suggestion: top with a scoop of vanilla ice cream. Olé
